changes.before: The heat was gone from it now. Only the residue remained, cold in the lungs and stubborn in cloth.
changes.after: The heat had gone. The residue had not.

changes.before: Three Farstrider mares waited under the low trees... laid arrows out by head instead of letting travel turn them into a heap.
changes.after: Three Farstrider mares waited under the low trees... Cyndia had done what haste allowed: checked throatlatches, reset bedroll ties, wrapped the spare bit rings in leather, sorted arrows by head instead of leaving them to rattle together.

changes.before: Jaina had come out with papers in both hands before she touched the food beside the fire.
changes.after: Jaina stood at the crate table with papers in both hands.

changes.before: If we keep riding village to village, we'll sharpen the count. Which bakeries got the worst flour first. Which roads the worst flour reached fastest. Which places sickened fastest.
changes.after: Village to village sharpens the count. Which bakeries got the worst flour first. Which roads sickened fastest.

changes.before: The strongest contamination in the stock was already burning out when we left, and the deeper pattern was still there. Stronger, if anything. Grain carries. Bodies keep. Something else wakes them.
changes.after: The stock there was already burning out when we left, and the deeper pattern held. Stronger, if anything. Grain carries. Bodies keep. Another hand wakes them.

changes.before: Road out. Dead counted. One cleaner dispatch home. The old border job still offered itself in pieces she could carry. North still sat on the page.
changes.after: Road out. Dead counted. Cleaner dispatch home. The old border job still offered itself in pieces she could carry. North sat on the page.

changes.before: Courtesy. Also discipline. A ranger who knew when the answer on the crate table mattered more than whatever sat in the bowl by the fire.
changes.after: Cut; Cyndia's discipline reads through the action without the footnote.

changes.before: She loosened the gray mare's throatlatch on the way in, all business, no theater.
changes.after: She loosened the gray mare's throatlatch on the way in, all business.

changes.before: He spoke for an hour... Contamination rates, relay counts, Eastweald dead, how fast it would move north if it kept going. Just numbers. Names. Dates. Grain totals.
changes.after: He spoke for an hour. No wit left in it. Just numbers. Names. Dates. Grain totals.

changes.before: Don't answer me as if I'm one of your captains.
changes.after: Don't answer me like I'm one of your captains.

changes.before: From here the call was only light, wind, and posture. That was enough.
changes.after: At this distance the call was only light, wind, and posture. That was enough.

changes.before: At first they rode through the same packed earth, broken ruts, and low hedges clawing at boot leather where the path narrowed. Saddle rub waking in the inner thigh. Yesterday still ached in her knees before today's miles had fully begun.
changes.after: At first through packed earth, broken ruts, and low hedges clawing at boot leather where the track narrowed. Yesterday still ached in her knees before today's miles had fully begun.

observations.note: Compressed the opening smoke paragraph by cutting the second explanation of heat loss and keeping the bruise image plus ash-in-lungs pressure.
Collapsed four separate camp-inventory beats into one operational sweep so Sylvanas reads the camp like a commander, not an annotator.
Trimmed Jaina's entrance and map setup; kept smoke, braid, and work-first posture, cut the extra lead-in around the food bowl and chalk smear explanation.
Shortened the south-versus-north analysis without losing the causal chain: village counts sharpen evidence, north finds the designer.
Reduced Sylvanas's internal border-job restatement by one sentence beat; the temptation remains, the redundancy does not.
Kept the question-answer structure on gain versus loss, but removed repeated timing phrasing so the scene moves straight to sea lead.
Cut the explanatory aside about Cyndia ignoring the bowl; her discipline now reads through behavior alone.
Compressed the post-decision meal beat to one clean rustle/scrape tag instead of repeating work-first characterization.
Trimmed Vereesa's arrival by stripping duplicate horse-spend detail while preserving the hard ride, inked fingers, and expensive vellum.
Tightened the recall-order exchange so the chamber language lands fast and Sylvanas gets to the human question sooner.
Condensed Lor'themar's council report to the cost-bearing facts: hour-long plea, token mobilization, and political exhaustion.
Reduced family-argument padding and let the title, the Thalassian name, and the refusal carry the emotional force.
Shortened the memory chain after Vereesa's plea by cutting one recall object and keeping the key hinge: Arthas, the harbors, and the home front counting walls.
Kept the thematic hinge 'home lies farther north' and cut the extra staging around it so the refusal lands cleanly.
Compressed the Antonidas sending-stone scene by cutting duplicate description of distance, amber light, and posture while preserving the refusal read.
Shortened Vereesa's departure scene without losing the mercy exchange, Lor'themar message, or the family-dust image.
Tightened the break-camp sequence; kept salt as the forward pull and removed repeated explanation of who stands where.
Compressed the ride north by pruning duplicate soreness, cloth-smoke, and observation beats while keeping the coast-road transition.
Reduced the relay-post stop to actionable facts only: answering harbors, low oats, passable road, no larger ships.
Closed on sea, failing relays, and the missed prince without repeating the same endgame pressure in multiple phrasings.
Replaced the vaguer 'Something else wakes them' with 'Another hand wakes them' to keep Jaina concrete and intentional instead of placeholder-vague.
Cut looked/look repetition across arrival and refusal beats; polish pass drove looked-verbs from 9 to 0.
Removed the chapter's lone 'as if' construction from dialogue to keep the family argument blunt instead of comparison-driven.
Trimmed eye/gaze scaffolding around the sending-stone exchange; Sylvanas now reads posture and light rather than narrating extra watching verbs.
Reduced breath-led reaction language to the three beats that earned it: Vereesa's dismount, Jaina's three-breath recalculation, and the horses in colder air.
Spoken-line audit found 0 document-register contaminations: no vector, diagnostic, actionable, optimal, propagation, or clinical narration disguised as speech.
Jaina's north/south explanation now stays in built plain speech for this partnership phase; she sounds precise without briefing-room jargon.
The recall order keeps formal diction only because Vereesa is reciting a sealed chamber order; her own voice drops into family and field register immediately after.
Sylvanas/Vereesa exchange now carries itself without narrator explanation after each blow; the lines do the cutting.
Final road-planning exchange avoids fake simplification: it cashes out into harbors, passage, weather, and ship access rather than abstract reassurance.

flags: Kept one non-sloppy 'like' in dialogue ('like I'm one of your captains') because it is direct family speech, not decorative comparison.
